hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push' && echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'vigilant-maxwell-QVb2q'; then cp /home/user/Emergency-Volunteer-System/index.html /tmp/gh-pages-deploy/preview/vigilant-maxwell-QVb2q/index.html && cd /tmp/gh-pages-deploy && git add preview/vigilant-maxwell-QVb2q/index.html && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m 'Preview: auto-deploy' && git push origin gh-pages); fi 2>/dev/null || true
